company_name.evidence_from_prospectus: The cover and important information pages display the company name as UBTECH ROBOTICS CORP LTD.

stock_code.evidence_from_prospectus: The cover and the Global Offering and Listing section disclose the stock code 9880.

headquarters_location.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights describes the company as based in the PRC and the name specifies Shenzhen.

incorporation_jurisdiction.evidence_from_prospectus: The cover states incorporated in the People's Republic of China.

company_history_milestones.evidence_from_prospectus: The milestone table in Summary and Highlights lists these points in time.

branch_offices_count.evidence_from_prospectus: Notes in History, Development and Corporate Structure state there are branch offices in Beijing and Baoan.

branch_offices.evidence_from_prospectus: Notes in History, Development and Corporate Structure list two branch offices.

value_example.name: Chaozhou UBTECH Education Technology Co., Ltd.

subsidiary_structure_snapshot.description: Snapshot of principal subsidiaries and ownership ratios at the prospectus disclosure date
subsidiary_structure_snapshot.evidence_from_prospectus: The structure chart in History, Development and Corporate Structure lists principal subsidiaries and respective equity ownership.

operating_facilities_count.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights disclose that as of the Latest Practicable Date, there are seven production facilities in operation.

strategic_positioning.value_example: smart service robotic products and services provider
strategic_positioning.evidence_from_prospectus: The Business Overview positions the company as a provider of smart service robotic products and services.

value_example: education smart robotic products and services
logistics smart robotic products and services
other sector-tailored smart robotic products and services
consumer-level robots and other hardware devices
product_segments.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights clearly divide business into four segments.

education_product_list.description: List of educational robot products and software
education_product_list.evidence_from_prospectus: The education segment lists robots, software, and support services.

logistics_product_list.description: List of logistics robots and supporting software
logistics_product_list.evidence_from_prospectus: The logistics segment lists AGV, AMR, WMS, and MES.

other_sector_product_list.description: Other industry tailored robot product list
other_sector_product_list.evidence_from_prospectus: Other industry segment lists Cruzr, Walker, ADIBOT.

consumer_product_list.description: List of consumer-grade robots and smart hardware
consumer_product_list.evidence_from_prospectus: The consumer segment lists these main products.

value_example: robotic motion planning and control technology
visual servo operation and human-robot interaction
technology_architecture.description: Technology architecture and core technology modules
technology_architecture.evidence_from_prospectus: The R&D technological capabilities section breaks down the tech stack into robotics tech, AI tech, integration tech, and the ROSA framework.

technology_platform.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights reveal that ROSA is a proprietary robotics application framework.

ai_capabilities.evidence_from_prospectus: Business Overview and tech sections note products have mapping, temperature measurement, facial recognition, computer vision, and voice interaction capabilities.

core_patent_count_total.description: Total registered robotics and AI-related patents
core_patent_count_total.evidence_from_prospectus: As of June 30, 2023, the company had more than 1,800 registered robotic and AI-related patents.

overseas_patent_count.evidence_from_prospectus: Of those, more than 380 are overseas patents.

rd_team_size.evidence_from_prospectus: As of June 30, 2023, the in-house R&D team comprised over 700 employees.

product_types_launched_count.evidence_from_prospectus: Over the Track Record Period, launched more than 50 types of products.

robotic_units_sold_cumulative.description: Cumulative sales volume of robotic products
robotic_units_sold_cumulative.evidence_from_prospectus: Track Record Period sales exceeded 760,000 units of robotic products.

rd_focus_area.value_example: core technologies utilized in humanoid robots
rd_focus_area.evidence_from_prospectus: The company discloses its R&D focus is on core technologies for humanoid robots.

technology_awards.description: Number of technology and patent awards
technology_awards.evidence_from_prospectus: Disclosed awards: two national-level awards, four provincial-level awards, and one international-level award.

value_example: sale of education smart robotic products and services
sale of logistics smart robotic products and services
sale of other sector-tailored smart robotic products and services
sale of consumer-level robots and other hardware devices
revenue_model.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights directly states revenue is primarily from sales of the above four categories of products and services.

pricing_model_examples.description: Examples of key product line pricing fields (by unit/project)
pricing_model_examples.evidence_from_prospectus: Segment tables disclose ASP for multiple product lines; logistics is expressed as average revenue per project.

sales_model.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights state revenue derives from direct sales, self-operated online stores, and distributors.

direct_sales_and_online_store_revenue_ra.description: Minimum revenue share from direct sales and self-operated online stores
direct_sales_and_online_store_revenue_ra.evidence_from_prospectus: During the Track Record Period, these channels contributed at least 80% of total revenue.

distribution_channels.evidence_from_prospectus: Description of clients and sales network covers government educational bureaus, enterprise customers, online stores, and distributors.

geographic_sales_regions.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights disclose that most revenue is from the PRC, others mainly from the US and Japan, etc.

prc_revenue_ratio.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights show PRC revenue share is 92.2%, 92.2%, 87.0%, and 73.3%, respectively.

countries_served_count.evidence_from_prospectus: Company serves China and over 50 other countries.

production_model.evidence_from_prospectus: Disclosed as using both in-house factories and contract manufacturers for some products.

contract_manufactured_products.evidence_from_prospectus: Production and suppliers section specifies main outsourced products.

supplier_types.evidence_from_prospectus: Suppliers are categorized as raw material/hardware suppliers and service subcontractors.

customer_segments.evidence_from_prospectus: Customer base described as including educational bureaus, enterprises, distributors, consumers.

enterprise_group_customers_count.evidence_from_prospectus: During the Track Record Period, served over 900 enterprise-level group customers.

top5_customer_revenue.description: Revenue contribution from top five customers
top5_customer_revenue.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights disclose top five customer sales figures.

top5_customer_revenue_percentage.description: Revenue share from top five customers
top5_customer_revenue_percentage.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights show top five customers accounted for 66.5%, 52.2%, 71.5%, 44.5% of revenue.

largest_customer_revenue.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights disclose largest customer sales.

largest_customer_revenue_percentage.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights show largest customer share: 37.8%, 21.4%, 27.4%, 27.4%.

customer_industry_distribution.evidence_from_prospectus: Industry and scenario breakdown is listed in business segment descriptions.

customer_order_example_nonrecurring.description: Large project order example (to support MD&A revenue fluctuation explanation)
customer_order_example_nonrecurring.evidence_from_prospectus: The revenue decline in 6M2023 is partly due to a non-recurring RMB66.8m, 12,010-unit education product order from Shaoyang not repeating in 6M2023.

target_market_size.evidence_from_prospectus: Frost & Sullivan forecast global and PRC smart service robotics market sizes as above.

market_growth_rate.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights report global CAGR 17.8%, PRC CAGR 23.5%.

rising demand for new energy vehicles

evolving technologies and changing product trends

market_position.evidence_from_prospectus: Frost & Sullivan ranks company 3rd in 2022 China smart service robotics by revenue (2.8% share); 1st in education robotics by revenue (22.5% share).

value_example: China-based with overseas presence and partnerships
competitive_advantages.evidence_from_prospectus: OUR COMPETITIVE STRENGTHS lists these advantages.

pricing_pressure_indicator.evidence_from_prospectus: Financial Information notes consumer hardware faces downward pricing pressure due to many similar/comparable products in the market.

net_loss_by_period.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights and Business Sustainability disclose net loss.

revenue_mix_by_segment_percentage.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights segment revenue mix table.

logistics_revenue_generating_projects.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights explain that number of logistics projects increased from 9 to 24 in 6M2023.

enterprise_level_revenue_share.evidence_from_prospectus: Segment tables show the share of revenue from enterprise-level smart service robotics.

education_plus_logistics_revenue_share.evidence_from_prospectus: Summary and Highlights disclose main revenue sources as education and logistics, with proportions as above.

non_standard_metrics_not_disclosed.evidence_from_prospectus: Disclosed operating metrics mainly include segment revenue, sales, ASP, project count, customer count, customer concentration; common SaaS metrics like MAU/DAU/ARR/CAC/LTV are not seen.

customer_concentration_percentage.evidence_from_prospectus: Top 5 and largest customer revenue shares are disclosed.

technology_dependency.description: Input for technology and R&D dependency risk
technology_dependency.evidence_from_prospectus: Company is highly dependent on sustained R&D and full-stack technologies, with a high R&D expense ratio.

single_product_or_segment_dependency.description: Input for single product/segment dependency risk
single_product_or_segment_dependency.evidence_from_prospectus: Education business accounts for a high proportion of revenue during multiple periods.

regulatory_sanctions_control_input.evidence_from_prospectus: Business section discloses that an internal control consultant reviewed export control compliance and customer/supplier background search policy.

implied_gross_funds_raise_range_hkd.evidence_from_prospectus: Calculated directly by 11,282,000 shares × HK$86.0/HK$116.0, with inputs from the cover's share count and price range.
